---
name: ant-history
description: "📜 Show colony event history"
---

Use the Go `aether` CLI as the source of truth.

- Execute `AETHER_OUTPUT_MODE=visual aether history $ARGUMENTS` directly.
- Do not read `.aether/data/COLONY_STATE.json` or parse event strings by hand.
- Report the CLI result directly.
